summary: Data-intensive SaaS for IT financial planning and cost transparency at enterprise scale.
highlights: Data-intensive SaaS for IT financial planning and cost transparency at enterprise scale.
Migrated Java and Kubernetes batch workloads to EMR Spark with Scala for scale and cost; roughly an order-of-magnitude faster processing while keeping services available.
Built a parallel reconciliation pipeline that ran legacy and new systems together, flagged discrepancies, and enabled incremental cutover with no correctness drift on financial datasets.
Reduced manual operations using Python, AWS Lambda, and Step Functions.

summary: Cloud directory and device management at organizational scale.
highlights: Cloud directory and device management at organizational scale.
Owned end-to-end technical design and delivery of a GraphQL-based Microsoft M365 integration serving more than 50,000 tenants.
Designed a multi-tenant GraphQL schema and production resolvers, the API layer, and a hybrid PostgreSQL plus MongoDB architecture balancing relational query performance with high write volume.

summary: Subscription commerce and service delivery for consumer printing at global scale.
highlights: Subscription commerce and service delivery for consumer printing at global scale.

Led transformation of a Ruby on Rails monolith into cloud-native, event-driven microservices using Domain-Driven Design and disciplined automated testing, scaling Instant Ink from thousands to millions of customers.
Coordinated engineering, DevOps, QA, and product across four geographically distributed teams while maintaining stability, availability, and reliability during rapid growth.
